Your anger.
Your laughter.
Your sadness.
Your tears.

events.full_text:
Osho Divine Zone Retreat – Meditation Retreat in Kaskikot, Nepal
Join us for a peaceful and transformative Meditation Retreat organized by Osho Divine Zone Retreat.

RETREAT DATES:
Tuesday 9th June, 4:00 PM until Sunday 14th June, 9:00 AM

LOCATION:
Kaskikot Mountain Area, Nepal

WHAT'S INCLUDED:
✅ Accommodation (Private Room or Shared Room)
✅ Daily Vegetarian Meals
✅ Osho Meditations
✅ Yoga Classes
✅ Guided Meditations
✅ Evening Satsang & White Robe Meditation
✅ Sound Healing Session
✅ Nature Hike (2–3 hours, weather permitting)

DAILY SCHEDULE:
7:00 AM – Morning Meditation
8:30 AM – Breakfast
10:00 AM – 11:00 AM – Yoga Class
11:30 AM – 12:30 PM – Guided Meditation
1:00 PM – Lunch
3:30 PM – Osho Meditation
6:00 PM – Evening Satsang & White Robe Meditation

SPECIAL ACTIVITIES:
🎶 Sound Healing Session (on one of the retreat days)
🥾 Short Nature Hike (2–3 hours) around the beautiful Kaskikot area, depending on weather conditions

WHY JOIN?
🌿 Relax in the peaceful Himalayan foothills
🧘 Deepen your meditation practice
💖 Experience inner silence and awareness
🤝 Connect with like-minded meditators
🏔️ Enjoy nature, fresh air, and mountain views

RESERVE YOUR SPACE:
Private and shared rooms are available. Early booking is recommended as spaces are limited.

CONTACT:
📱 WhatsApp: +977 984197477

We look forward to welcoming you to this beautiful journey of meditation, awareness, and inner transformation.

With Love,
Osho Divine Zone Retreat – Kaskikot, Nepal 🕉️🌿✨

🌿✨ OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP ✨🌿

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Unlock unconscious power to support meditation and transformation
events.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
Unlock the power of your unconscious to support your meditation and transformation

In this 7-day early morning course (7:30 - 8:30 am daily), you will be gently guided into the art of self-hypnosis — a powerful gateway to deep relaxation and transformation. Through subtle shifts in awareness and intention, you will access the vast, hidden resources of your unconscious and learn how to plant seeds of clarity and change. As your unconscious becomes an ally, meditation blossoms effortlessly. Trust deepens, relaxation arises naturally, and insight unfolds without struggle.

"The secret of hypnosis is that it takes you to the unconscious, and then you can put the seed of anything in the unconscious, and it will grow, blossom. The blossoming will happen in the conscious, but the roots will remain in the unconscious." — Osho

With Sadhana

events.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
events.venue: Online
events.description: Live online course exploring stress management through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
events.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

events.description: Uncover hidden family patterns shaping relationships and inner world
events.full_text:
Family Constellation - 1 Day
Uncover the hidden family patterns shaping your relationships and inner world

Family Constellation is a meditative and illuminating journey that unveils the hidden patterns within your family system, patterns that continue to shape your emotional and energetic landscape. Often, without conscious awareness, we bear the burdens and unresolved sorrows of those who came before us – echoes of generational pain woven into our being. You are invited to gently disentangle from what does not belong to you, creating space for your own life to blossom.

"Humanity is passing through a very critical phase. It has to be decided whether we want to live according to the past or we want to live a new style of life. It is enough! We have tried the past and its patterns and they have all failed. The time is ripe to get out of the grip of the past and to create a new style of life on the earth." — Osho

With Ambu

Kasaar Devi में ओशो मेडिटेशन कैंप

क्या आप 18 से 21 जून तक कसार देवी में होने वाले हमारे लग्ज़री ओशो मेडिटेशन कैंप (Osho meditation camp) में शामिल होने की सोच रहे हैं?

क्यों न आप हमारे साथ 3 रातें और 4 दिन बिताएं, जहाँ आपको कसार देवी के सबसे बेहतरीन अनुभवों का आनंद लेने का मौका मिलेगा। यहाँ हर दिन खास तौर पर चुनी गई कई 'एक्टिव मेडिटेशंस' (सक्रिय ध्यान) कराई जाएंगी, जिनमें से कुछ में स्वामी वातायन द्वारा लाइव म्यूज़िक भी दिया जाएगा।

@oshobliss_experiences को फॉलो करें और कसार देवी के इस अद्भुत जियोमैग्नेटिक एनर्जी फील्ड (भू-चुंबकीय ऊर्जा क्षेत्र) में आकार ले रहे इस खूबसूरत अनुभव से जुड़े रहें।

हमें वहां आपका स्वागत करते हुए बेहद खुशी होगी।

events.full_text:
OSHO® Festival On The River
~Return to Life~

June 18-21, 2026

Agriturismo Assia
Fucecchio (FI)

Event presentations continuing!

At the festival, there will be a succession of moments in celebration, in joy, feeling at home, immersed in nature, in open spaces without walls that enclose you, without barriers, letting energies and vibrations flow. A succession of emotions that we will carry inside and will give us smiles and hugs.

Saturday June 20 from 09:30 there will be a complete novelty for our festival! For the first time with us we will have Supriya Ermione and with great joy, we are happy to be able to celebrate and travel with her in her event.

Supriya's Event: Connected and Vulnerable

A continuous unveiling of oneself and compromising one's image. How do we let ourselves be seen? How do we let ourselves be contaminated? How do we find our center?

About Supriya:
Circus artist and tantrika, counselor, lover of life, Alma Mater Studiorum University of Bologna graduate. She spends her life traveling and in freedom to know what love is. Mother, lover and friend, she now teaches Tantra and conscious sexuality at the international ISTA school and the Temple Arts Academy based in Verona.

We look forward to spending together a small space of our journey, to celebrate together.

Saturday June 20 with open arms and heart to experience a new and intense adventure with the exciting OSHO® Festival On The River!

events.title: OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Awaken intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot cards
events.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
Awaken your intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot

Using OSHO Zen Tarot cards, this is an opportunity to develop our intuition from the perspective of the here and now – the perspective of Zen. Where traditional tarot often looks to the past or tries to predict the future, OSHO Zen Tarot brings us into the present moment. Rooted in the wisdom of Zen, these cards reflect our inner world – our thoughts, feelings, and energies – as they are right now. They become a mirror, helping us to see what we might not yet recognize, and offering insight and clarity without judgment.

"If you have looked meditatively at the Tarot card … And they are cards to be meditated upon; they are old secret methods of meditation." — Osho

With Ambu

events.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
events.venue: Humaniversity
events.description: Workshop on healing sexual trauma through conscious sexuality work with awareness, safety, and honest communication.
events.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Consious Sexuality workshop at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Consious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

events.title: Hidden Ties, Inner Voices: Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems
events.venue: Quest Haven Retreat Center
events.description: Weekend exploration using Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems frameworks to illuminate internalized beliefs, inherited family voices, and unconscious mind patterns for personal growth and awareness.
events.full_text:
Hidden Ties, Inner Voices: Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems

Facilitator: Subhan Schenker

Dates: June 27-28, 2026

Venue: Quest Haven Retreat Center
Location: San Marcos, CA

Workshop Overview:
In this weekend exploration, Subhan will be working with the Family Constellations framework that can help illuminate the different internalized beliefs and "voices" unconsciously inherited from families. These often influence and guide choices and behaviors, and contribute to conflicts and struggles in life.

Additionally, he will utilize the Internal Mind Systems framework to reveal the different "parts" (personas, character structures, and developmental stages) that live seemingly frozen within the mind. These parts have become the unconscious filters through which reality passes and from which we react to life.

By using these 2 modalities, participants can begin the process of bringing more awareness to how these parts of the mind impact daily life, and begin to loosen the patterned grip they impose.

For more information, visit: www.oshoniranjana.org

Contact: Osho Niranjana Center
Website: www.oshoniranjana.org/event-details/family-constellations-internal-mind-systems-workshop-1

events.description: Timeless techniques for going beyond the mind via tantra
events.full_text:
Meditations from The Book of Secrets - 2 Days
Timeless techniques for going beyond the mind

Vigyan Bhairav Tantra is an ancient Sanskrit text containing 112 simple ways to access the experience of silence and stillness that is meditation. The Book of Secrets is Osho's masterly exposition of the text, and one of his most popular series. Tantra is not a philosophy, it is a way of moving beyond the duality of the mind to a clear, direct experience of reality. This is the transformation.

"You are the truth just here and now, so it is not something which is to be created or something which is to be devised or something which is to be sought. Understand this very clearly; then these techniques will be easy to understand and also to do." — Osho

With Sadhana

Sing Your Heart Out - 1 Day
Celebrating your unique voice in song

Singing is as natural to us as to the birds, but we lose touch with the instinct to enjoy our voices. Communication is so much more than words, but unless we actually listen as we sing or speak, our unique inner meaning is missed. Befriend your voice, listen to it with love – restore this vital bridge between your inner and outer worlds.

events.full_text:
Women's Circle - 1 Day
Returning to Yin: a circle of healing, sisterhood, and embodied joy

For millennia, women have gathered in sacred circles to reconnect with their innate feminine wisdom – sensitivity, intuition, compassion, and joy. Within this nurturing space, we return to the healing power of Yin through stillness, relaxation and celebration. events.title: OSHO No-Mind
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 7-day meditative therapy: 1 hour daily gibberish speaking (no meaning, no control) + 1 hour silent witnessing. Reduces overthinking, promotes clarity and inner peace.
events.full_text:
Have you tried "underthinking"? OSHO No-Mind is not what you think it is.

For 7 days, one hour a day, you speak gibberish — sounds, nonsense, whatever wants to come out. No meaning. No control.

Then for the second hour, you sit silently and witness.
By day 7, the overthinking loosens. You feel lighter, clearer, more like yourself.

OSHO No-Mind happens every month, starting on the 3rd, at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India.

Learn more and join: https://bit.ly/OSHO-No-Mind-Resort

Share this with someone whose mind won't stop talking

events.full_text:
Family Constellation - 1 Day
Uncover the hidden family patterns shaping your relationships and inner world

Family Constellation is a meditative and illuminating journey that unveils the hidden patterns within your family system, patterns that continue to shape your emotional and energetic landscape. Often, without conscious awareness, we bear the burdens and unresolved sorrows of those who came before us – echoes of generational pain woven into our being. You are invited to gently disentangle from what does not belong to you, creating space for your own life to blossom.

"Humanity is passing through a very critical phase. It has to be decided whether we want to live according to the past or we want to live a new style of life. It is enough! We have tried the past and its patterns and they have all failed. The time is ripe to get out of the grip of the past and to create a new style of life on the earth." — Osho

With Ambu

events.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence. 7 days of 3-hour daily laughter, 7 days of crying, 7 days of silent sitting.
events.full_text:
Some experiences change you forever. OSHO Mystic Rose is one of them — 21 days of laughing, crying, and sitting silently until everything heavy inside finally lets go.

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
🌹 Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

👉 More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

#OSHOMysticRose #MeditativeTherapy #LaughterAndTears #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #MeditationRetreat

Breath Energy - 1 Day
Awaken your breath energy, your inner source

Discover the intimate connection between your breath, your bodymind, your emotions, and your being. Breath is so much more than oxygen – it is your bridge to the present moment, to feeling fully alive. events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Unlock unconscious power to support meditation and transformation
events.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
Unlock the power of your unconscious to support your meditation and transformation

In this 7-day early morning course (7:30 - 8:30 am daily), you will be gently guided into the art of self-hypnosis — a powerful gateway to deep relaxation and transformation. Through subtle shifts in awareness and intention, you will access the vast, hidden resources of your unconscious and learn how to plant seeds of clarity and change. As your unconscious becomes an ally, meditation blossoms effortlessly. Trust deepens, relaxation arises naturally, and insight unfolds without struggle.

"The secret of hypnosis is that it takes you to the unconscious, and then you can put the seed of anything in the unconscious, and it will grow, blossom. The blossoming will happen in the conscious, but the roots will remain in the unconscious." — Osho

With Richa

events.title: Breath Energy
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Awaken breath energy, your inner source and bridge to presence.
events.full_text:
Breath Energy - 1 Day
Awaken your breath energy, your inner source
Discover the intimate connection between your breath, your bodymind, your emotions, and your being. Breath is so much more than oxygen – it is your bridge to the present moment, to feeling fully alive. You are invited to explore the silent power of your breath, to use it as a portal to access deeper awareness, love, and healing. Conscious Connected Breathing, emotional release and heart-centered sharing will all help you begin to rediscover the joy of simply being.
"If you can become the master of your breathing – and it is a deep science – you become master of your emotions." Osho
Jul 12, 2026 ~ with Devendra

events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Unlock unconscious power for meditation and transformation.
events.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
Unlock the power of your unconscious to support your meditation and transformation
In this 7-day early morning course (7:30 - 8:30 am daily), you will be gently guided into the art of self-hypnosis – a powerful gateway to deep relaxation and transformation. Through subtle shifts in awareness and intention, you will access the vast, hidden resources of your unconscious and learn how to plant seeds of clarity and change. As your unconscious becomes an ally, meditation blossoms effortlessly. Trust deepens, relaxation arises naturally, and insight unfolds without struggle.
"The secret of hypnosis is that it takes you to the unconscious, and then you can put the seed of anything in the unconscious, and it will grow, blossom. The blossoming will happen in the conscious, but the roots will remain in the unconscious." Osho
Jul 12 - 18, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.title: OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Awaken intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot cards
events.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
Awaken your intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot

Using OSHO Zen Tarot cards, this is an opportunity to develop our intuition from the perspective of the here and now – the perspective of Zen. Where traditional tarot often looks to the past or tries to predict the future, OSHO Zen Tarot brings us into the present moment. Rooted in the wisdom of Zen, these cards reflect our inner world – our thoughts, feelings, and energies – as they are right now. They become a mirror, helping us to see what we might not yet recognize, and offering insight and clarity without judgment.

"If you have looked meditatively at the Tarot card … And they are cards to be meditated upon; they are old secret methods of meditation." — Osho

With Sadhana

events.title: Trauma Healing - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Beyond trauma to a life of freedom and healing
events.full_text:
Trauma Healing - 1 Day
Beyond trauma – a life of freedom

Are you burdened by feelings of powerlessness? Do you sometimes feel like the victim of forces beyond your control? Do you often feel resentful, anxious, guilty? Do you find you can't trust yourself not to blindly overreact in certain situations? These are the effects of past trauma, embedded in the nervous system, and can be released. Healing is possible.

"Medicine heals the body, meditation heals your soul. But their function is the same – healing." — Osho

With Richa

events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Reconnect with vital energy through breath, movement and awareness
events.full_text:
Breath of Life - Morning Mini Course
Reconnect with your vital energy through breath, movement, and mindful awareness

This is an invitation to wake up the natural energy that flows through you with every breath – to celebrate your aliveness. Through conscious breathing, joyful movement, and meditative awareness, you will reconnect with the vibrancy that is your true nature. Tensions will melt, emotions will be released, and your life energy will begin to move freely again. Come alive … and then more alive!

"Celebration means dropping this whole trip of becoming – just being here. When becoming disappears, all the smoke of becoming disappears, there is the flame of being, and that very flame is celebration." — Osho

With Devendra

events.full_text:
🌿 MONSOON FESTIVAL – OSHO MEDITATION CAMP, MOUNT ABU 🌿

A golden opportunity to meet yourself amidst cool monsoon showers, green mountains, and a serene atmosphere…

You are invited to a deep, peaceful, and joyful Osho meditation camp.

✨ This special event is organized by Celebrate Life Retreat.

This camp will take you away from the daily rush and connect you with inner peace, love, and awareness.

In the loving presence of Ma Prem Anjali and Ma Prasannata, a journey of meditation, silence, music, and self-experience awaits you.

📍 VENUE:
Osho Abu Dham Resort, Peshua Village, Ahmedabad-Delhi Highway, Rajasthan

👉 This location is approximately 25-30 km from Mount Abu.
You can easily reach Mount Abu by train (Abu Road Station) or bus. From there, it is simple to reach the resort by taxi/auto.

🌧️ SPECIAL ATTRACTIONS IN MONSOON:
During the rainy season, this entire area becomes lush and green. The play of clouds on mountains, cool breeze, and serene atmosphere make it perfect for meditation.

Nearby, you can also enjoy beautiful places like Nakki Lake, Sunset Point, and Dilwara Jain Temple.

🗓️ DATES:
23 July (evening) to 26 July (afternoon)

events.title: OSHOBA The Drum Beat Meditation - 3 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: No-Mind experience of sound, silence and letting go
events.full_text:
OSHOBA The Drum Beat Meditation - 3 Days
The No-Mind experience of sound, silence, and letting go

Your heart begins to leap, your energy soars, expands and moves freely as you center yourself and dance with OSHOBA. Through rhythm and stillness, something within you takes flight. This course is an invitation to let go and play music together in a way that feels rare and deeply alive – an experience beyond performance, beyond effort. It is an experiential meditation in precision, discipline, and awareness, where sound and silence become gateways to presence.

"If the drummer is good and really knows how to create an atmosphere through the drumbeat, nobody can be there without being affected. Even a Buddha would like to dance." — Osho

With Hansa, Nivedano, Punitama

events.title: OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Treat body with gratitude and trust, it is your friend
events.full_text:
OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind - 7 Days
Treat your body with gratitude and trust, it is your friend and companion

This seven-day course, lasting one hour per day, invites you in deep relaxation to tune into your "bodymind." You will learn to befriend and trust its intelligence, and find new solutions for optimal health, balance, and well-being. The course meets from 7.30 am to 8.30 am over seven days. The process can be continued or refreshed at any time.

"The body is the most complex mechanism in existence – it is simply marvelous. And blessed are those who marvel." — Osho

With Richa

events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Discover alignment, ease and lightness through meditative movement
events.full_text:
Mindfulness and Moving - Mentastics - 1 Day
Discover alignment, ease, and lightness through meditative movement and breath

Mindfulness and Moving – Mentastics invites you into a gentle exploration of movement and awareness. Through playful, meditative exercises, tension softens and the body's natural rhythm reawakens. Each movement becomes an invitation to experience balance, vitality, and inner spaciousness – a living bridge between motion and stillness, body and meditation.

"The really healthy person is not stuck anywhere, he is not stagnant. He is dynamic. He can be in great action and yet he can remain inactive. He knows the way of wu-wei, he knows the way of action through inaction. You will have to learn that." — Osho

With Satsavya

events.title: A Day for the Heart - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Beyond mind and thought, the heart knows truth and love
events.full_text:
A Day for the Heart - 1 Day
Beyond mind, beyond thought – the heart knows

Take a break from the constant nagging of the head with its judgments, criticism, doubts, and fears, and relax into the stillness of the heart. The heart offers a gentle refuge from the overactive mind. In this day of relaxation and reconnection, you will discover how to shift from the head into the heart – where presence, love, and simplicity reside.

"Rather than questioning, you should start moving toward the heart. That is the true rebelliousness, love revolting against logic. And then from love to being is a very simple, very joyful way. It is a garden path full of roses." — Osho

With Sadhana

Celebrating the New Woman - 1 Day
Rejoice in your feminine energies, celebrate being a woman

Open the door to the mystic feminine within: dancing in our feminine energies and expressing them freely through movement, we become aware of the joy and freedom they bring to our lives. This gathering of women is a loving and supportive space to explore – and let go of – the ways we have learned to cut ourselves off from our inner richness.

"Rejoice in your feminine qualities, make a poetry of your feminine qualities. That is your great inheritance from nature." — Osho

With Ambu

events.title: OSHO Born Again Facilitating Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 7-day facilitating course learning to hold space for OSHO Born Again process with expression and silent meditation. Facilitators: Sudheer & Asmita.
events.full_text:
OSHO Born Again Facilitating – the rare chance to learn how to hold a space where others can become children again.

If you've loved the OSHO Born Again process, you already know its power. One hour of being a child again — dancing, singing, jumping, crying, doing whatever you always wanted to do. The second hour of sitting silently, where after total expression, silence arrives all by itself. No forcing. No fighting the mind.

This 7-day Facilitating Course is offered twice a year at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Mornings are spent in the regular OSHO Born Again process itself. Afternoons are dedicated to deepening your understanding and learning to facilitate this revolutionary process with care, sensitivity, and presence.

Upcoming date:
17 – 23 August 2026 with Sudheer & Asmita

Prior participation in an OSHO Born Again course is recommended.

More info: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Born-Again-Facilitating
Booking: https://bit.ly/Living-In-Programs-Overview

events.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
events.venue: Zorba the Buddha
events.description: Four-day nature retreat featuring Kambo, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation for physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual cleansing.
events.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
📍 Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

✨ Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple:

SPACE.

🌿 Space to release.
🌿 Space to listen.
🌿 Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

THE JOURNEY INCLUDES:

🐸 KAMBO
👁️ SANANGA
🔥 SWEAT LODGE
🌳 FOREST BATHING
⚡ OSHO KUNDALINI MEDITATION

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

☘️ Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

💬 "After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

🌿 In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

ZORBA THE BUDDHA • DELHI

#ShamanicHealing #HealingRetreat #ConsciousLiving #MeditationRetreat #ForestBathing

events.title: Osho Silence Retreat (5 days)
events.venue: Osho Sanzen
events.description: 5-day silent meditation retreat with Ma Dhyan Abha. Daily sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen, and evening satsang with Osho energy transmission. Advance group for experienced practitioners.
events.full_text:
Osho Silence Retreat (5 days)
21 - 25 October, 2026
(Opening - 20th October, evening)
with: Ma Dhyan Abha

"Silence is the soul of meditation..."

Osho has said this many times, and not only Osho, every master has emphasised this.

This Osho silence retreat will make us experience how! In Osho Sanzen, these 5 days will be of silence. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, in which the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Morning sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen and pleasant music will help seekers go deeper with each passing day. Every evening in satsang, Osho energy will shower upon all of us. This is an advance group.

If you want to experience yourself closely, you are welcome:

Osho Sanzen, Kotla, Solan, HP
088943 51962
(advance booking)

Osho Sanzen India
Kotla, Solan, Himachal Pradesh
